Clarifying Questions for the Absolute Version
1. Do you want theoretical orthodoxy (stay rigorously faithful to the thinker’s texts) or creative heresy (push until the doctrine breaks and bleeds)?
2. Should the final text-act be partially or wholly unreadable in ordinary language (heavy strikethrough, infinite footnotes, pure phonetic chora, etc.)?
3. Tone preference: cold deconstructive dissection ↔ delirious jouissance ↔ revolutionary fury ↔ melancholic subaltern mourning?
4. Do you want an 11th seed that is pure Glissantian Opacité/Créolisation/Relation?
5. Should the outputs be formatted so they can be directly compiled into an experimental poetry/theory manuscript?
—-
